reference: I am a fifty-five-year-old male who was painting my living room. While painting, I proceeded to jump up on my tiptoes to reach a higher spot. Later that evening, I started to experience severe pain in my back, hip, thigh, groin, and now the back of my leg on my right side. Is there a need for concern?
text: I am a fifty-five-year-old male who was painting my living room. While painting, I proceeded to jump up on my tiptoes to reach a higher spot. Later that evening, I started to experience severe pain in my back, hip, fire, groin, and now the back of my leg on my right side. Is there a need, son?
